## Inputs
- [ ] SLO attainment & error-budget burn (links to dashboards)
- [ ] Incident summaries (SEV1/SEV2)
- [ ] Roadmap deltas
- [ ] Business priorities update

## Checklist
- [ ] SLIs still represent user experience
- [ ] SLO targets appropriate (payments highest, VIN consistency strict)
- [ ] Alert noise/priorities tuned
- [ ] Error-budget policy followed (freezes when exhausted)
- [ ] MTTD/MTTR trend reviewed
- [ ] Top 3 contributors identified with CPAs

## Decisions
- Target changes:
- Alert tuning:
- Reliability investments:

## Actions
- [ ] Action — Owner — Due
